name: GLOBAL ELITE
short_description: Save the Earth from countless swarms of giant insects as a valiant member of the GLOBAL ELITE! Auto-battle your way to victory with a ragtag crew of survivors! Use every weapon at your disposal to crush those bugs and save humanity! Join the fight and become a member of the GLOBAL ELITE!
detailed_description:
Our Earth is under attack! Giant insects swarm the globe, rampaging across the land and devouring all who stand in their way. Humanity has fallen, but the fight's not over yet!

Deploy around the globe to defend Earth against countless swarms of bloodthirsty bugs! Lead a ragtag force of survivors to fight back and reclaim what's ours. Save civilians, recover supplies, root out infestations, and squash those bugs! We are the GLOBAL ELITE!

Features

  • Auto-battle waves of giant insects while collecting resources and saving civilians
  • Get to the chopper and get out before being overwhelmed, so runs are as short or as long as you can make them
  • Save special characters to build your team of GLOBAL ELITEs
  • Upgrade your capabilities between runs to improve your ability to fight back
